items.title: Bitcoin gets a green light from a reliable momentum gauge. Here are key levels to watch
items.summary: A smoother long-term MACD just flipped bullish, pointing to more upside. Here are key levels that will decide if the ongoing bounce turns into a full blown uptrend.

items.title: Live markets: Bitcoin tops $64,000 as selling pressure on Coinbase eases
items.summary: Spot bitcoin funds lost about $95 million on Thursday and ether funds roughly $52 million, ending the one bright spot in crypto's institutional flows even as prices rallied.

items.title: EU parliament passes ‘chat control,’ allowing private chat scans until 2028
items.summary: EU lawmakers have again allowed tech firms to scan chats for abuse material, but exempted end-to-end encrypted messages.

items.title: Robinhood Chain sees over $70M in ETH bridged during first week
items.summary: Robinhood’s choice to use Ethereum further solidifies its position as the “ultimate settlement layer and liquidity foundation for tokenized assets,” said HashKey Group’s Tim Sun.

items.title: XRP up 2% as buyers push through $1.10 resistance
items.summary: A late-session volume surge carried XRP above its recent range, with traders now watching whether $1.10 can hold as support.

items.title: Bitcoin's quiet split: Strong in USD, lagging in JPY as Yen rises on intervention fears
items.summary: A sharp rise in the yen has left bitcoin and other major cryptocurrencies underperforming in yen terms compared with their dollar-based trading pairs.

items.title: Zcash targets July 28 launch for Ironwood network upgrade
items.summary: Zcash’s next upgrade will replace the once-compromised Orchard pool and may offer clues about whether counterfeit tokens were created via a recent bug.

items.title: Bitcoin zips higher to nearly $64,000 as chip rally and yen strength drive gains
items.summary: Bitcoin is up 4.2% over seven days that contained an oil shock, a bond selloff and two rounds of U.S. strikes on Iran.

items.title: Hackers tried to backdoor Injective npm package to steal wallet keys
items.summary: The incident is significant for developers and applications that handle Injective wallet workflows, Socket researchers said.

items.title: DeFi may be ‘quietly re-rating’ given outperformance against Bitcoin: Bitwise
items.summary: “DeFi usually swings much harder than Bitcoin, so holding up this well is unusual,” says Bitwise, as DeFi tokens have outperformed Bitcoin.

items.title: New Hampshire snuffs out trailblazing state-government bitcoin bond effort
items.summary: At its last stage for government approval, the state's executive council rejected the bond project 3-2.

items.title: AI Agents Could Be Turned Into Botnets Through Hallucinations, Researchers Warn
items.summary: Researchers warn AI agents could be tricked into downloading malicious code by exploiting the same hallucinations that cause chatbots to make mistakes.

items.title: Coinbase chief legal officer to transition to advisory role on July 31
items.summary: The soon-to-be former chief legal officer did not announce the details of his next move but said that he would continue working with the Board of Coinbase National Trust Company.

items.title: Avalanche Treasury Firm AVAX One Reclaims Nasdaq Compliance After Reverse Stock Split
